_comment: Merge this into your claude_desktop_config.json (merge the mcpServers block with any existing one).
_handoff: get_passive_tree returns allocatedNodeIds[] → pass each to poe2-mcp inspect_passive_node.

pob-assistant._comment: PoBAI: offline PoB2 build parsing, snapshot storage, build inspection. Run: node dist/index.js
_tools: import_pob_build  — parse PoB2 base64 code or raw XML, returns snapshot_id
get_skills        — skill groups with gem details
get_items         — items with optional slot filter
get_defenses      — life, ES, resistances, armour, evasion, block
get_passive_tree  — tree URL, version, allocatedNodeIds[] (for poe2-mcp handoff)
delete_build      — remove a build by snapshot_id

poe2-mcp._comment: HivemindOverlord/poe2-mcp: 38 live PoE2 tools (gem DB, DPS calc, passive tree, trade). Install: pip install poe2-mcp

character_analysis: import_poe_ninja_url    — import from poe.ninja profile URL
analyze_passive_tree    — passive node analysis with pathfinding
get_live_game_state     — read running PoE2 client state
passive_tree: inspect_passive_node    — KEY HANDOFF: call with node_id from our get_passive_tree.allocatedNodeIds[]
